subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who desired the Face whilst in the hands of the ungodly, and turned first with his heart, then with his feet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اراد الوجه اذ کان بین ایدی المشرکین و اقبل بقلبه ثم برجله
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment
